_comment: Copy this file to dart_defines.json and paste your Anthropic (Claude) key. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys . The Run config 'kBuzz (AI keys)' passes the file via --dart-define-from-file, so a fresh install gets AI (scan + demo) without entering a key in Profile. dart_defines.json is gitignored — NEVER commit a real key; it also ships inside the build binary, so for a public release use a backend proxy instead.
